creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: wg
Date: Wed Aug 21 14:07:52 2013
New Revision: 325133
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325133

Log:
  databases/jrrd: update to 1.0.6
  
  - Update to 1.0.6 [1]
  - Trim Makefile header [1]
  - Convert to new LIB_DEPENDS syntax
  - Remove leading article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/180841
  Submitted by:	Sevan Janiyan <venture37 geeklan.co.uk> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/databases/jrrd/Makefile
  head/databases/jrrd/distinfo

Modified: head/databases/jrrd/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/jrrd/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 14:00:43 2013	(r325132)
+++ head/databases/jrrd/Makefile	Wed Aug 21 14:07:52 2013	(r325133)
@@ -1,20 +1,15 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	databases/jrrd
-# Date created:		25 June 2008
-# Whom:			Ryan T. Dean <rtdean@cytherianage.net>
-#
+# Created by: Ryan T. Dean <rtdean@cytherianage.net>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	jrrd
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.5
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.6
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/opennms/JRRD/stable-1.0
 
 MAINTAINER=	venture37@geeklan.co.uk
-COMMENT=	A Java native interface (JNI) to RRDtool
+COMMENT=	Java native interface (JNI) to RRDtool
 
-LIB_DEPENDS=	rrd:${PORTSDIR}/databases/rrdtool
+LIB_DEPENDS=	librrd.so:${PORTSDIR}/databases/rrdtool
 
 USE_JAVA=	yes
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6

Modified: head/databases/jrrd/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/jrrd/distinfo	Wed Aug 21 14:00:43 2013	(r325132)
+++ head/databases/jrrd/distinfo	Wed Aug 21 14:07:52 2013	(r325133)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (jrrd-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 4b2142c04c265546fcd98a940df220612bff0eff119135198f42d9358249a5ce
-SIZE (jrrd-1.0.5.tar.gz) = 303265
+SHA256 (jrrd-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 5b2f9866d93fd9660e603c4e6b8fe58bba82869e0a0ccbf5cfe48b64b2ba521f
+SIZE (jrrd-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 326278
